windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: Hands position a clear glass tumbler on a table strewn with decorative beads and fairy lights, prepping the transparent vessel for a gel-look candle.
windows.description_detailed: Hands position a clear glass tumbler on a table strewn with decorative beads and fairy lights, prepping the transparent vessel for a gel-look candle. prep phase, ~0% in, 0:00–0:07.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: White wax pellets are scooped/poured into a small metal pouring pitcher; a tealight and supplies sit on the table.
windows.description_detailed: White wax pellets are scooped/poured into a small metal pouring pitcher; a tealight and supplies sit on the table. prep phase, ~13% in, 0:07–0:15. Terminology: double boiler.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: The metal pitcher sits on a small burner; the wax melts into a clear, colourless liquid.
windows.description_detailed: The metal pitcher sits on a small burner; the wax melts into a clear, colourless liquid. process phase, ~25% in, 0:15–0:23.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: The clear molten wax is stirred in the pitcher with a wooden stick to fully liquefy it.
windows.description_detailed: The clear molten wax is stirred in the pitcher with a wooden stick to fully liquefy it. process phase, ~37% in, 0:23–0:31.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: Clear molten wax is poured from the pitcher into the decorated glass; a wick is held upright on a stick laid across the rim.
windows.description_detailed: Clear molten wax is poured from the pitcher into the decorated glass; a wick is held upright on a stick laid across the rim. assemble phase, ~50% in, 0:31–0:39. Terminology: container candle.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: The glass fills with transparent wax around the centred wick; embedded beads and glitter settle in the clear body.
windows.description_detailed: The glass fills with transparent wax around the centred wick; embedded beads and glitter settle in the clear body. assemble phase, ~63% in, 0:39–0:47. Terminology: sinkhole.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: A hand holds up the finished glittery transparent candle, then it is shown lit.
windows.description_detailed: A hand holds up the finished glittery transparent candle, then it is shown lit. finish phase, ~75% in, 0:47–0:55.

windows.video_title: DIY Transparent Candle Without Gel | Elegant and Easy Tutorial
windows.description: Beauty shot of the finished lit transparent candles arranged among the bead-and-light decor.
windows.description_detailed: Beauty shot of the finished lit transparent candles arranged among the bead-and-light decor. finish phase, ~87% in, 0:55–1:03.
